Localization.Description: An attack is detected or blocked

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The attack "{object.name}" is detected on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
The attack "{object.name}" from {src.host}:{src.port} to {dst.host}:{dst.port} is detected on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
The attack "{object.name}" from {src.host}:{src.port} to {dst.host}:{dst.port} is blocked on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
The attack "{object.name}" is blocked on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
